Title: Account lockout threshold is not configured
Remediation: Configure account lockout threshold according to organizational policy.

Title: Host firewall is not enabled for all profiles
Remediation: Enable host firewall for all network profiles.

Title: Audit policy does not capture logon events
Remediation: Enable audit policy for logon success and failure events.

Title: Volume encryption status is not documented
Remediation: Document encryption status and remediation plan for unprotected volumes.

Title: Unnecessary service is enabled
Remediation: Disable unnecessary services or document business justification.
